allow: Bash(uv venv && uv pip install -r requirements.txt)
Bash(chmod +x examples/simple_example.py && uv run python examples/simple_example.py)
Bash(uv run python -c "import edgeunicompile as euc; euc.MLIRInstaller.install\(\)" 2>/dev/null; uv run python examples/simple_example.py)
Bash(chmod +x examples/minimal_example.py && uv run python examples/minimal_example.py)
Bash(cd .. && rm -rf .venv && uv venv && uv pip install -e .)
Bash(rm -rf build && mkdir build && cd build && cmake .. -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=clang++ 2>&1)
